remaining_tasks.name: Run plan-phase to create executable plan
Execute Batch 1: Fix benchmark.py bug and TaskConfig regex
Execute Batch 2: Fix example YAML configs
Execute Batch 6: Fix API documentation structure
Execute Batch 7: Fix user guide import paths
Execute Batch 8: Fix user guide API signatures
Execute Batch 9: Fix user guide config keys
Execute Batch 10: Fix user guide CLI commands

decisions.decision: Local validation: run core notebook cells; CI: import+initialization only (non-blocking)
decisions.rationale: Full execution requires heavy dependencies (torch/transformers/CUDA) that may not be available in CI

decisions.decision: All fixes are per-file reviewed, no script-based bulk replacements
decisions.rationale: Documentation prose may legitimately reference strings being fixed; per-file review prevents accidental corruption

decisions.decision: Fix TaskConfig regex to accept both short and full task type names
decisions.rationale: Backward compatibility; zero code uses TaskType enum directly

decisions.decision: Execution order: pattern-based traversal (source -> YAML -> imports -> config keys -> API signatures -> CLI -> task types -> MCP -> notebooks -> API docs -> tutorials -> CI)
decisions.rationale: Builds context memory on one pattern before moving to next; more efficient for sequential file processing

next_action: Run /gsd:plan-phase 07 to create executable plan based on locked SPEC.md and CONTEXT.md
context_notes: Phase 07 is ready for planning. SPEC.md (12 requirements) and CONTEXT.md (4 decisions) are committed. Key scout findings: (1) dnallm/__init__.py already exports load_model_and_tokenizer and DNADataset, so some import path fixes may be no-ops; (2) pyproject.toml registers dnallm-train/inference/mcp-server as standalone commands, so some CLI fixes need re-evaluation; (3) MCP server exposes tool names WITHOUT underscore prefix, so MCP tool name fixes may be no-ops. These findings are documented in CONTEXT.md code_context section.
